# Digital Zen - LLM Context

## Project Overview
Modern Angular project (v21+) - Chrome Extension for productivity and focus management.

## Tech Stack
- **Angular:** v21 (latest stable)
- **TypeScript:** v5.9 (strict mode)
- **Styling:** SCSS with BEM naming convention
- **State Management:** Angular Signals (primary), RxJS (for async streams)
- **Build:** Angular CLI with custom Chrome extension build pipeline

## Key Angular Patterns

### Component Architecture
- **Standalone Components** (no NgModules)
- `ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush` by default
- Dependency injection via `inject()` function (not constructor)

### Reactivity
- **Signals** for local and shared state (`signal()`, `computed()`)
- **RxJS** only for HTTP requests and complex async operations

### Template Syntax
- New control flow: `@if`, `@for`, `@switch`, `@defer`
- No legacy directives: `*ngIf`, `*ngFor`, `*ngSwitch`

### Functional Patterns
- Functional interceptors (`HttpInterceptorFn`)
- Functional guards (`CanActivateFn`)

## Project Structure
```
src/
├── app/              # Main app component
├── modules/          # Feature modules
│   ├── common/       # Shared components, services, utilities
│   ├── focus/        # Focus mode feature
│   ├── menu/         # Menu feature
│   └── auth/         # Authentication
├── background/       # Chrome extension background scripts
└── styles/           # Global styles
```

## Coding Standards
- Use strict TypeScript (no `any` types)
- Prefer functional patterns over class-based
- Follow BEM naming: `dz-block__element--modifier`
- Private fields with `#` prefix
- Readonly for injected services

## Chrome Extension Specifics
- Manifest v3
- Background service workers
- OAuth integration for Google authentication
- Content security policies apply

## Quick Reference

**Create a component:**
```typescript
@Component({
  selector: 'dz-example',
  templateUrl: './example.html',
  styleUrls: ['./example.scss'],
  changeDetection: ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush,
  imports: [CommonModule],
})
export class ExampleComponent {
  readonly #service = inject(SomeService);
  protected readonly data = signal<Data[]>([]);
}
```

**Template example:**
```html
@if (data().length > 0) {
  @for (item of data(); track item.id) {
    <div>{{ item.name }}</div>
  }
} @else {
  <p>No data available</p>
}
```

## Commands
- `npm start` - Development server
- `npm run build` - Production build
- `npm test` - Run tests
- `npm run lint` - Lint code
- `npm run format` - Format with Prettier
